scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @slow-dating/api" "npm run dev -w @slow-dating/web"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @slow-dating/api && npm run build -w @slow-dating/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @slow-dating/contracts && npm run build -w @slow-dating/config && npm run build -w @slow-dating/realtime && npm run build -w @slow-dating/game-kit && npm run build -w @slow-dating/content && npm run build -w @slow-dating/ui
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run build
